The '''''New Order Progressive''''' was the daily newsfeed service of the [[New Order Party]]. Among its employees was [[Alendar Jarvis]] who wrote a fake news report about [[Wilhuff Tarkin/Legends|Wilhuff Tarkin's]] death in a shuttle crash.

==Appearances==
*{{JournalCite|3|Galaxywide NewsNets}}
